title: HAN frontmatter (Handoff)
description: Required YAML frontmatter for a HAN (Handoff) document. category MUST be "Handoff". Extra frontmatter keys are allowed.

category.description: Must be exactly "Handoff" for a HAN document.

work_state.description: Delegation work state, e.g. ACTIVE / PARKED / BLOCKED.

orchestrator_contact.description: Who the coordinator reports to (orchestrator or operator channel).

related_pl.description: Wikilink to the meta-plan / governing plan this HAN binds to.
